description: Manifest of OpenBody minimum-core conformance vectors (SPEC §8.3). A conformance runner loads each file and checks the assertion for its `kind`. Covers the §8.3 minimum-core list; the extended activity corpus lives in CORPUS.md.

coverage.scoring_kinds: reps, time, distance, energy, continuous — all five
coverage.core_structures: resistance set, round/interval/for-time blocks, continuous endurance (§3.1)
coverage.value_objects: Target (all 4 variants incl. relativeToThreshold + stopCondition), Load (absolute + relative), EffortLoad, phasePattern (durations + ratios + qualifier), outcome, participants, ThresholdProfile, StatusPeriod
coverage.round_trip: opaque ExerciseRef, unknown extension, unknown open token, tombstone, supersession
coverage.sampleArray: regular + irregular, single + multi-channel, null dropped sample
coverage.normalization: sets-expansion with exact pinned `expected` canonical bytes

todo: tabata scheme; accumulation flag; Program with progression; modifiers beyond bfr; isokinetic (resistanceProfile accommodating + velocity target)
more pinned `expected` on additional normalization vectors as they're added
extended activity-coverage corpus (CORPUS.md): Highland games, kabaddi, freediving, isokinetic, climbing send/attempt/flash, swimming SWOLF, etc.
